name: Steamed Rice (Korean Bab)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the rice into a cooking pot and fill it nearly to the brim with cold water. Drain the water, repeating this process 4 or 5 times until the water is clear. This removes excess starch from the rice.
2. Add 2 cups of water to cover the rice completely. Allow it to stand for 30 minutes, then bring to a boil. Reduce heat and steam until dry, about 20 minutes. For each person served in America, use half a cup of uncooked rice. Koreans may require double the amount, especially men.
Note: The attribution line has been removed as per instructions.
